exec_err: WindowingError: window functions are not allowed in FILTER
sql:
SELECT "treatment", 
       MAX("G") AS max_dissolution_rate, 
       MAX("OmegaAragonite") FILTER (WHERE "G" = MAX("G") OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment")) AS omega_at_max_dissolution
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH max_dissolution AS (
  SELECT "treatment", MAX("G") AS max_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
  GROUP BY "treatment"
)
SELECT mt.max_G / mc.max_G AS dissolution_factor
FROM max_dissolution mt
JOIN max_dissolution mc ON mt."treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' AND mc."treatment" = 'shell.californianus'

SELECT 
  "treatment", 
  COUNT(*) AS number_of_shells, 
  AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate, 
  STDDEV(-"G") AS stddev_dissolution_rate
FROM 
  "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE 
  "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY 
  "treatment"

WITH mean_dissolution AS (
  SELECT 
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN 'californianus'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS species,
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus') THEN 'unsealed'
      WHEN "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus.painted', 'shell.californianus.painted') THEN 'sealed'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS seal_status,
    AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1
  GROUP BY species, seal_status
)
SELECT 
  species,
  (SELECT mean_dissolution_rate FROM mean_dissolution WHERE species = m.species AND seal_status = 'unsealed') -
  (SELECT mean_dissolution_rate FROM mean_dissolution WHERE species = m.species AND seal_status = 'sealed') AS dissolution_rate_difference
FROM mean_dissolution m
WHERE seal_status = 'unsealed'

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.californianus%' THEN "shell.wt" END) /
       AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.trossulus%' THEN "shell.wt" END) AS weight_ratio
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  "treatment",
  REGR_SLOPE("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS slope,
  CORR("G", "OmegaAragonite") AS pearson_correlation
FROM 
  "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY 
  "treatment"

SELECT 
    "treatment",
    COUNT("shell.number") AS number_of_shells,
    AVG(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate
FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE 
    "OmegaAragonite" < 1
GROUP BY 
    "treatment"
ORDER BY 
    "treatment"

SELECT "treatment", 
       AVG("shell.wt") AS mean_shell_weight, 
       STDDEV("shell.wt") AS stddev_shell_weight
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    avg(-"G") AS mean_dissolution_rate,
    stddev_samp(-"G") AS sd_dissolution_rate,
    count(*) AS n
  FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE 
    "OmegaAragonite" < 1
  GROUP BY 
    "treatment"
)
SELECT 
  "treatment",
  mean_dissolution_rate,
  1.96 * sd_dissolution_rate / sqrt(n) AS ci_half_width
FROM 
  stats

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    AVG("G") AS mean_G,
    STDDEV_SAMP("G") AS stddev_G,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE 
    "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND 
    "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
  GROUP BY 
    "treatment"
),
cohens_d AS (
  SELECT 
    (trossulus.mean_G - californianus.mean_G) / 
    SQRT(((trossulus.n - 1) * POWER(trossulus.stddev_G, 2) + (californianus.n - 1) * POWER(californianus.stddev_G, 2)) / 
    (trossulus.n + californianus.n - 2)) AS cohens_d
  FROM 
    stats trossulus
  JOIN 
    stats californianus ON trossulus."treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' AND californianus."treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
)
SELECT cohens_d FROM cohens_d

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT
    "treatment",
    AVG(-"G") AS mean_neg_G,
    VARIANCE(-"G") AS var_neg_G,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')
  GROUP BY "treatment"
)
SELECT
  (s1.mean_neg_G - s2.mean_neg_G) /
  SQRT((s1.var_neg_G / s1.n) + (s2.var_neg_G / s2.n)) AS welch_t_statistic
FROM
  (SELECT * FROM stats WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus') s1,
  (SELECT * FROM stats WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus') s2

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    avg("G") AS mean_G,
    stddev("G") AS stddev_G,
    count(*) AS n
  FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE 
    "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND 
    "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.trossulus.painted')
  GROUP BY 
    "treatment"
),
means AS (
  SELECT 
    (SELECT mean_G FROM stats WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus') AS mean_unsealed,
    (SELECT mean_G FROM stats WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus.painted') AS mean_sealed,
    (SELECT stddev_G FROM stats WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus') AS stddev_unsealed,
    (SELECT stddev_G FROM stats WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus.painted') AS stddev_sealed,
    (SELECT n FROM stats WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus') AS n_unsealed,
    (SELECT n FROM stats WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus.painted') AS n_sealed
)
SELECT 
  (mean_unsealed - mean_sealed) / 
  sqrt(((n_unsealed - 1) * stddev_unsealed^2 + (n_sealed - 1) * stddev_sealed^2) / (n_unsealed + n_sealed - 2)) AS cohens_d
FROM 
  means

SELECT (AVG("G") FILTER (WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus') - AVG("G") FILTER (WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus.painted')) /
       SQRT((VAR_SAMP("G") FILTER (WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus') / COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus')) +
            (VAR_SAMP("G") FILTER (WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus.painted') / COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus.painted')))
       AS welch_t_statistic
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1

SELECT "treatment", 
       PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY -"G") AS median_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' THEN -"G" END) / 
       AVG(CASE WHEN "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' THEN -"G" END) AS ratio_mean_dissolution_rate
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "treatment" IN ('shell.trossulus', 'shell.californianus')

SELECT width_bucket("OmegaAragonite", 0, 10, 5) AS omega_bin, COUNT(*) AS shell_count
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY omega_bin
ORDER BY omega_bin

WITH treatment_stats AS (
  SELECT "treatment",
         avg("G") AS mean_G,
         stddev_samp("G") AS sd_G
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  GROUP BY "treatment"
),
z_scores AS (
  SELECT "shell.number",
         "treatment",
         "G",
         ("G" - ts.mean_G) / ts.sd_G AS z_score
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus" ad
  JOIN treatment_stats ts ON ad."treatment" = ts."treatment"
)
SELECT "shell.number", "treatment", "G", z_score
FROM z_scores
ORDER BY z_score DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT "shell.number", "OmegaAragonite", AVG("G") OVER (ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS moving_avg_G
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus'
ORDER BY "OmegaAragonite"

SELECT "shell.number", "treatment", "G", 
       PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "treatment" ORDER BY "G" DESC) AS rank
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
ORDER BY rank DESC
LIMIT 5

exec_err: UndefinedFunction: function skewness(double precision) does not exist
sql:
SELECT skewness(-"G") AS population_skewness
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT count(*) AS unsealed_trossulus_exceeding_californianus_max
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.trossulus' 
  AND "G" > (
    SELECT max("G")
    FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
    WHERE "treatment" = 'shell.californianus'
  )

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    count(*) AS n,
    avg("G") AS mean_g,
    sum("G" * "G") AS sum_g2
  FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE 
    "OmegaAragonite" < 1
  GROUP BY 
    "treatment"
),
overall AS (
  SELECT 
    count(*) AS total_n,
    avg("G") AS overall_mean_g
  FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE 
    "OmegaAragonite" < 1
),
anova AS (
  SELECT 
    sum(s.n * (s.mean_g - o.overall_mean_g) * (s.mean_g - o.overall_mean_g)) AS ss_between,
    sum(s.sum_g2 - s.n * s.mean_g * s.mean_g) AS ss_within,
    count(*) - 1 AS df_between,
    sum(s.n) - count(*) AS df_within
  FROM 
    stats s, overall o
)
SELECT 
  ss_between / df_between AS ms_between,
  ss_within / df_within AS ms_within,
  (ss_between / df_between) / (ss_within / df_within) AS f_statistic,
  df_between AS df_between,
  df_within AS df_within
FROM 
  anova
SELECT COUNT(*) AS shell_record_count FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT "treatment", COUNT(*) AS shell_count
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "shell.length" IS NULL) AS missing_shell_length,
  COUNT(*) AS total_shells
FROM 
  "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
SELECT MIN("OmegaAragonite") AS min_omega_aragonite, MAX("OmegaAragonite") AS max_omega_aragonite FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT count(*) AS n_rows, 
       count(DISTINCT "shell.number") AS distinct_shell_numbers, 
       min("shell.number") AS min_shell_number, 
       max("shell.number") AS max_shell_number
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
    min("G") AS min_calcification_rate,
    max("G") AS max_calcification_rate,
    count(*) FILTER (WHERE "G" < 0) AS net_dissolving_shells_count
FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT MIN("duration") AS min_duration, 
       MAX("duration") AS max_duration, 
       AVG("duration") AS avg_duration
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "treatment") AS distinct_treatments,
       "treatment",
       COUNT(*) AS frequency
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"
ORDER BY frequency DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT MIN("shell.wt") AS min_shell_weight, 
       MAX("shell.wt") AS max_shell_weight, 
       AVG("shell.wt") AS mean_shell_weight
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1) AS shells_with_OmegaAragonite_less_than_1,
  COUNT(*) AS total_shells
FROM 
  "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "OmegaAragonite", 
    "G", 
    "treatment",
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.trossulus%' THEN 'trossulus'
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.californianus%' THEN 'californianus'
    END AS species,
    CASE 
      WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%.painted' THEN 'sealed'
      ELSE 'unsealed'
    END AS sealing
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "G" < 0
),
model_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "OmegaAragonite",
    LN(-"G") AS ln_neg_G,
    species,
    sealing,
    species || '_' || sealing AS interaction
  FROM filtered_data
),
regression AS (
  SELECT 
    regr_slope(ln_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") AS omega_coefficient,
    regr_intercept(ln_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") AS intercept,
    regr_count(ln_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") AS n,
    regr_r2(ln_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") AS r_squared,
    regr_sxx("OmegaAragonite", ln_neg_G) AS sxx,
    regr_syy(ln_neg_G, "OmegaAragonite") AS syy,
    regr_sxy("OmegaAragonite", ln_neg_G) AS sxy
  FROM model_data
),
statistics AS (
  SELECT 
    omega_coefficient,
    SQRT((syy - sxy * sxy / sxx) / (n - 2) / sxx) AS standard_error,
    omega_coefficient / SQRT((syy - sxy * sxy / sxx) / (n - 2) / sxx) AS t_statistic,
    n
  FROM regression
)
SELECT 
  omega_coefficient,
  standard_error,
  t_statistic,
  n
FROM statistics

WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT "treatment", "G", "OmegaAragonite"
  FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
  WHERE "OmegaAragonite" < 1 AND "G" < 0
),
log_transformed AS (
  SELECT "treatment", LN(-"G") AS log_dissolution
  FROM filtered_data
),
treatment_dummies AS (
  SELECT 
    "treatment",
    log_dissolution,
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE 'shell.trossulus%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_trossulus,
    CASE WHEN "treatment" LIKE '%painted' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_painted
  FROM log_transformed
)
SELECT 
  regr_intercept(log_dissolution, is_trossulus) AS intercept,
  regr_slope(log_dissolution, is_trossulus) AS species_coefficient,
  regr_slope(log_dissolution, is_painted) AS sealing_coefficient,
  regr_slope(log_dissolution, is_trossulus * is_painted) AS interaction_coefficient
FROM treatment_dummies

SELECT "treatment", 
       COUNT("shell.length") AS num_shells_with_length, 
       AVG("shell.length") AS mean_shell_length, 
       STDDEV("shell.length") AS stddev_shell_length
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE "shell.length" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT "treatment",
       AVG("duration") AS mean_duration,
       STDDEV("duration") AS stddev_duration
FROM "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
GROUP BY "treatment"

SELECT 
    count(*) AS shell_count,
    avg("G") AS mean_G,
    avg("G") - 1.96 * stddev_samp("G") / sqrt(count(*)) AS lower_95_CI,
    avg("G") + 1.96 * stddev_samp("G") / sqrt(count(*)) AS upper_95_CI
FROM 
    "abiotic_dissolution_Mtrossulus_Mcalifornianus"
WHERE 
    "treatment" = 'shell.californianus' 
    AND "OmegaAragonite" > 1
SELECT MIN("Irrigation_times") AS min_irrigations, MAX("Irrigation_times") AS max_irrigations FROM "2023_crop_data"

WITH height_data AS (
  SELECT "Crop", unnest(array[50, 60, 70, 80, 90, 100, 110, 120, 130, 140]) AS days,
         unnest(array["Average_height_50", "Average_height_60", "Average_height_70", "Average_height_80", 
                      "Average_height_90", "Average_height_100", "Average_height_110", "Average_height_120", 
                      "Average_height_130", "Average_height_140"]) AS height
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
),
slope_data AS (
  SELECT "Crop", 
         regr_slope(height, days) AS ols_slope,
         COUNT(height) AS n_observations
  FROM height_data
  WHERE height IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "Crop"
)
SELECT "Crop", ols_slope, n_observations
FROM slope_data

SELECT "Crop", "Site", AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival, COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
GROUP BY "Crop", "Site"
ORDER BY mean_survival DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH site_pea_data AS (
  SELECT "Site", "Crop", AVG("Survival") AS avg_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" IN ('black pea', 'green pea')
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
),
site_counts AS (
  SELECT "Site"
  FROM site_pea_data
  GROUP BY "Site"
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT "Crop") = 2
),
survival_comparison AS (
  SELECT spd1."Site",
         MAX(CASE WHEN spd1."Crop" = 'black pea' THEN spd1.avg_survival ELSE NULL END) AS black_pea_survival,
         MAX(CASE WHEN spd1."Crop" = 'green pea' THEN spd1.avg_survival ELSE NULL END) AS green_pea_survival
  FROM site_pea_data spd1
  JOIN site_counts sc ON spd1."Site" = sc."Site"
  GROUP BY spd1."Site"
)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_sites,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE black_pea_survival > green_pea_survival) AS black_pea_better_sites
FROM survival_comparison

WITH site_survival AS (
  SELECT "Site", "Crop", avg("Survival") AS mean_survival
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Site" IN ('Kiamo', 'Kibber', 'Tashigang') AND "Crop" IN ('barley', 'green pea')
  GROUP BY "Site", "Crop"
)
SELECT b."Site", 
       b.mean_survival AS barley_mean_survival, 
       g.mean_survival AS green_pea_mean_survival
FROM site_survival b
JOIN site_survival g ON b."Site" = g."Site" AND b."Crop" = 'barley' AND g."Crop" = 'green pea'
WHERE b.mean_survival > g.mean_survival

SELECT avg("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate, count(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea' AND "Site" = 'Kiamo'

SELECT 
  "Crop",
  AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival,
  STDDEV_SAMP("Survival") AS sd_survival,
  COUNT(*) AS n_plots
FROM 
  "2023_crop_data"
GROUP BY 
  "Crop"
ORDER BY 
  "Crop"

SELECT "Crop", 
       "Site", 
       AVG("Survival") AS mean_survival_rate, 
       COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM "2023_crop_data"
GROUP BY "Crop", "Site"
ORDER BY "Crop", "Site"

SELECT 
    percentile_cont(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_100") AS height_25th_percentile,
    percentile_cont(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_100") AS height_50th_percentile,
    percentile_cont(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Average_height_100") AS height_75th_percentile,
    COUNT(*) AS num_plots
FROM 
    "2023_crop_data"
WHERE 
    "Crop" = 'black pea' AND "Average_height_100" IS NOT NULL

WITH max_heights AS (
  SELECT "Site", "Field_no", "Plot_no", "Crop",
         GREATEST("Average_height_50", "Average_height_60", "Average_height_70", "Average_height_80", 
                  "Average_height_90", "Average_height_100", "Average_height_110", "Average_height_120", 
                  "Average_height_130", "Average_height_140") AS max_height
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
),
binned_heights AS (
  SELECT max_height,
         CASE 
           WHEN max_height > 120 THEN 'Overflow'
           ELSE floor(max_height / 24) * 24 || '-' || (floor(max_height / 24) * 24 + 24)
         END AS height_bin
  FROM max_heights
)
SELECT height_bin, COUNT(*) AS plot_count
FROM binned_heights
GROUP BY height_bin
HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
ORDER BY height_bin

SELECT "Type" AS most_common_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM "peapca_supplement_genome"
GROUP BY "Type"
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT CORR("Average_height_100", "Average_leaves_100") AS pearson_correlation,
       COUNT(*) AS n_plots
FROM "2023_crop_data"
WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
  AND "Average_height_100" IS NOT NULL
  AND "Average_leaves_100" IS NOT NULL

WITH ranked_plots AS (
  SELECT "Site", "Survival",
         PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "Site" ORDER BY "Survival") AS survival_percentile
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea' AND "Survival" IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT "Site", "Survival", survival_percentile
FROM ranked_plots

WITH black_pea_data AS (
  SELECT "Site", 
         ("Average_height_50" + "Average_height_60" + "Average_height_70" + 
          "Average_height_80" + "Average_height_90" + "Average_height_100" + 
          "Average_height_110" + "Average_height_120" + "Average_height_130" + 
          "Average_height_140") / 10 AS mean_height
  FROM "2023_crop_data"
  WHERE "Crop" = 'black pea'
),
stats AS (
  SELECT AVG(mean_height) AS overall_mean, 
         STDDEV_SAMP(mean_height) AS overall_stddev
  FROM black_pea_data
)
SELECT bpd."Site", 
       bpd.mean_height, 
       (bpd.mean_height - s.overall_mean) / s.overall_stddev AS z_score
FROM black_pea_data bpd, stats s

SELECT corr("Pea_n18_NC_066579"."col_5", "Pea_n18_NC_066580"."col_5") AS pearson_correlation,
       COUNT(*) AS accession_pairs
FROM "Pea_n18_NC_066579"
JOIN "Pea_n18_NC_066580" ON "Pea_n18_NC_066579"."col_1" = "Pea_n18_NC_066580"."col_1"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_crop_plots FROM "2023_crop_data"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows, COUNT(DISTINCT "Helper_ID") AS distinct_helper_ids FROM "2023_crop_data"
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Site") AS distinct_sites, COUNT(DISTINCT "Crop") AS distinct_crops FROM "2023_crop_data"

SELECT MIN("Survival") AS min_survival, MAX("Survival") AS max_survival
FROM "2023_crop_data"

SELECT MAX(ABS("col_1" - "col_2")) AS max_asymmetry
FROM "Pea_n18_NC_066583"

SELECT 
    count(DISTINCT "Sample ID") AS n_accessions,
    count("col_9") AS non_null_col_9,
    count("col_14") AS non_null_col_14
FROM 
    "peapca_supplement_genome"

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") AS num_participants
FROM "new_elisa_public"
WHERE "breakthru" = 1 AND "time" = 'initial' AND "IDorHV" IN ('HV', 'PID')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") AS participants_infected_before_vaccination
FROM "new_elisa_public"
WHERE "fb_predose1_inf" = 1

SELECT "IDorHV", COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") AS n_participants
FROM "new_elisa_public"
JOIN "pp_raw_public" ON "new_elisa_public"."Subject.ID" = "pp_raw_public"."SUBJECT.ID."
WHERE "persistant_inf" = 1 AND "IDorHV" IN ('HV', 'PID')
GROUP BY "IDorHV"

SELECT "IDorHV", COUNT(*) AS num_participants
FROM "outcomes_public"
WHERE "Long_Covid" = 1
GROUP BY "IDorHV"

SELECT o."IDorHV", COUNT(DISTINCT o."Subject.ID") AS n_participants
FROM "outcomes_public" o
WHERE o."reinfected" = 1
GROUP BY o."IDorHV"

SELECT "new_elisa_public"."new_group", COUNT(*) AS breakthrough_hospitalisations
FROM "new_elisa_public"
JOIN "inf_public" ON "new_elisa_public"."Subject.ID" = "inf_public"."SUBJECT.ID."
WHERE "new_elisa_public"."breakthru" = 1 AND "inf_public"."hosp_days" > 0
GROUP BY "new_elisa_public"."new_group"

SELECT "new_group",
       "number_doses_before_covid",
       AVG("conc.ug_ml") AS mean_igg_titre,
       STDDEV("conc.ug_ml") AS sd_igg_titre
FROM "new_elisa_public"
WHERE "number_doses_before_covid" IN ('Dose 2', 'Dose 3', 'Dose 4')
GROUP BY "new_group", "number_doses_before_covid"
ORDER BY "new_group", "number_doses_before_covid"

SELECT "IDorHV", 
       AVG("persistant_number_days") AS average_duration, 
       STDDEV("persistant_number_days") AS sd_duration
FROM "pp_raw_public"
JOIN "outcomes_public" ON "pp_raw_public"."SUBJECT.ID." = "outcomes_public"."Subject.ID"
WHERE "IDorHV" IN ('HV', 'PID')
GROUP BY "IDorHV"

SELECT "IDorHV", COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") AS participant_count
FROM "new_elisa_public"
GROUP BY "IDorHV"

SELECT 
    MIN("share") AS min_share,
    MAX("share") AS max_share,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "share" < 0 OR "share" > 1) AS count_outside_0_1
FROM 
    "SARS_CoV_2_Variant_Proportions_2023_09_28"

SELECT DISTINCT "number_doses_before_covid"
FROM "new_elisa_public"
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT "number_doses_before_covid"
FROM "inf_public"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS raw_elisa_rows_with_na FROM "new_elisa_public" WHERE "number_doses_before_covid" = 'NA'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") AS ever_infected_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT "SUBJECT.ID.") AS infection_table_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") = COUNT(DISTINCT "SUBJECT.ID.") AS all_present
FROM "outcomes_public"
LEFT JOIN "inf_public" ON "outcomes_public"."Subject.ID" = "inf_public"."SUBJECT.ID."
WHERE "outcomes_public"."ever_infected" = 1

WITH breakthrough_patients AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "Subject.ID"
  FROM "new_elisa_public"
  WHERE "breakthru" = 1
),
symptoms_reported AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "SUBJECT.ID."
  FROM "inf_public"
  WHERE "fatigue" = TRUE AND "cough" = TRUE AND "nausea_vomiting" = TRUE
),
breakthrough_with_symptoms AS (
  SELECT bp."Subject.ID"
  FROM breakthrough_patients bp
  JOIN symptoms_reported sr ON bp."Subject.ID" = sr."SUBJECT.ID."
),
total_breakthrough AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") AS total
  FROM breakthrough_patients
),
total_with_symptoms AS (
  SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") AS with_symptoms
  FROM breakthrough_with_symptoms
)
SELECT 
  tws.with_symptoms::double precision / tb.total AS share_with_symptoms,
  tb.total AS number_surveyed
FROM total_breakthrough tb, total_with_symptoms tws

SELECT "IDorHV", 
       AVG(CASE "after.behaviors.returned"
               WHEN 'Very false for me' THEN 1
               WHEN 'Somewhat false for me' THEN 2
               WHEN 'Slightly false for me' THEN 3
               WHEN 'Slightly true for me' THEN 4
               WHEN 'Somewhat true for me' THEN 5
               WHEN 'Very true for me' THEN 6
           END) AS mean_likert_score,
       COUNT("after.behaviors.returned") AS number_of_respondents
FROM "behavior_raw_public" b
JOIN "outcomes_public" o ON b."id" = o."Subject.ID"
GROUP BY "IDorHV"

WITH pre_infection_igg AS (
  SELECT "Subject.ID", "conc.ug_ml"
  FROM "new_elisa_public"
  WHERE "COVID_pos_before_sample" = 0
),
reinfection_status AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "Subject.ID", "reinfected"
  FROM "outcomes_public"
)
SELECT r."reinfected",
       percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY p."conc.ug_ml") AS median_igg_titre,
       COUNT(p."Subject.ID") AS n
FROM pre_infection_igg p
JOIN reinfection_status r ON p."Subject.ID" = r."Subject.ID"
GROUP BY r."reinfected"

exec_err: GroupingError: column "new_elisa_public.vaccine_6_date" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function
sql:
SELECT "IDorHV", 
       AVG("number_doses") AS avg_doses, 
       STDDEV("number_doses") AS sd_doses
FROM (
    SELECT "Subject.ID", "IDorHV",
           CASE 
               WHEN "vaccine_6_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 6
               WHEN "vaccine_5_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 5
               WHEN "vaccine_4_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 4
               WHEN "vaccine_3_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 3
               WHEN "vaccine_2_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 2
               WHEN "vaccine_1_date" IS NOT NULL THEN 1
               ELSE 0
           END AS "number_doses"
    FROM "new_elisa_public"
    GROUP BY "Subject.ID", "IDorHV"
) AS subquery
GROUP BY "IDorHV"

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT
    "breakthru",
    avg("conc.ug_ml") AS mean_titre,
    stddev_samp("conc.ug_ml") AS sd_titre,
    count(*) AS n
  FROM
    "new_elisa_public"
  WHERE
    "number_doses_before_covid" = 'Dose 3'
    AND "COVID_pos_before_sample" = 0
  GROUP BY
    "breakthru"
),
calc AS (
  SELECT
    (s1.mean_titre - s0.mean_titre) AS diff_means,
    sqrt(
      (s1.sd_titre * s1.sd_titre / s1.n) +
      (s0.sd_titre * s0.sd_titre / s0.n)
    ) AS se_diff
  FROM
    stats s0
    JOIN stats s1 ON s0."breakthru" = 0 AND s1."breakthru" = 1
)
SELECT
  diff_means / se_diff AS welch_t_statistic
FROM
  calc

WITH fatigue_counts AS (
    SELECT "new_group",
           SUM(CASE WHEN "fatigue" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fatigue_yes,
           SUM(CASE WHEN NOT "fatigue" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fatigue_no
    FROM "inf_public"
    WHERE "infection_timing" = 'Breakthrough'
    GROUP BY "new_group"
),
total_counts AS (
    SELECT SUM(fatigue_yes) AS total_fatigue_yes,
           SUM(fatigue_no) AS total_fatigue_no
    FROM fatigue_counts
),
expected_counts AS (
    SELECT "new_group",
           (total_fatigue_yes * (fatigue_yes + fatigue_no) / (total_fatigue_yes + total_fatigue_no)) AS expected_fatigue_yes,
           (total_fatigue_no * (fatigue_yes + fatigue_no) / (total_fatigue_yes + total_fatigue_no)) AS expected_fatigue_no
    FROM fatigue_counts, total_counts
),
chi_square AS (
    SELECT "new_group",
           ((fatigue_yes - expected_fatigue_yes) ^ 2 / expected_fatigue_yes) +
           ((fatigue_no - expected_fatigue_no) ^ 2 / expected_fatigue_no) AS chi_square_contribution
    FROM fatigue_counts
    JOIN expected_counts USING ("new_group")
)
SELECT SUM(chi_square_contribution) AS chi_square_statistic
FROM chi_square

SELECT 
    "time",
    percentile_cont(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "conc.ug_ml") AS Q1,
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "conc.ug_ml") AS median,
    percentile_cont(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "conc.ug_ml") AS Q3
FROM 
    "new_elisa_public"
GROUP BY 
    "time"
ORDER BY 
    "time"

WITH ranked_variants AS (
  SELECT
    "variant",
    "week_ending",
    "share",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "week_ending" ORDER BY "share" DESC) AS rank
  FROM
    "SARS_CoV_2_Variant_Proportions_2023_09_28"
  WHERE
    "usa_or_hhsregion" = 'USA'
    AND "modeltype" = 'weighted'
)
SELECT
  "variant",
  "week_ending",
  "share"
FROM
  ranked_variants
WHERE
  rank = 1
ORDER BY
  "week_ending"
LIMIT 25

WITH ranked_igg AS (
  SELECT 
    "Subject.ID",
    MAX("conc.ug_ml") AS peak_igg,
    "new_group",
    "breakthru",
    NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY MAX("conc.ug_ml") DESC) AS quartile,
    PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY MAX("conc.ug_ml") DESC) AS percentile_rank
  FROM 
    "new_elisa_public"
  GROUP BY 
    "Subject.ID", "new_group", "breakthru"
),
top_15 AS (
  SELECT 
    "Subject.ID",
    peak_igg,
    "new_group",
    "breakthru",
    quartile,
    percentile_rank
  FROM 
    ranked_igg
  ORDER BY 
    peak_igg DESC
  LIMIT 15
)
SELECT 
  "Subject.ID",
  peak_igg,
  "new_group",
  "breakthru",
  quartile,
  percentile_rank
FROM 
  top_15

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") AS num_breakthrough_bivalent_patients
FROM "new_elisa_public"
WHERE "breakthru" = 1 AND "any_bivalent" = 1 AND "IDorHV" IN ('HV', 'PID')

SELECT 
    "new_group",
    AVG("days_between_vax_covid") AS mean_days,
    STDDEV("days_between_vax_covid") AS sd_days
FROM 
    "inf_public"
GROUP BY 
    "new_group"

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "Subject.ID") AS participants_count
FROM "new_elisa_public"
WHERE "fb_predose1_inf" = 1 AND "breakthru" = 1

SELECT species, population, total
FROM "raw_group_size"

SELECT "population", "species", "size"
FROM "raw_body_length"
WHERE "sex" = 'female'

exec_err: UndefinedFunction: function kruskal_wallis_test(double precision, text) does not exist
sql:
SELECT kruskal_wallis_test("size", "population") AS kruskal_wallis_chi_square
FROM "raw_body_length"
WHERE "sex" = 'male'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_courtship_assays
FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
WHERE "species" = 'P. lata' AND "sex" = 'male' AND "court_presence" > 0

SELECT "pop_treatment", COUNT(*) AS courtship_count
FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
WHERE "species" = 'P. lata' AND "sex" = 'male' AND "court_presence" > 0
GROUP BY "pop_treatment"

SELECT AVG("size") AS mean_body_length, STDDEV("size") AS stddev_body_length
FROM "raw_body_length"
WHERE "species" = 'Blackburn' AND "sex" = 'female'

SELECT "species", AVG("total") AS mean_aggregation_size
FROM "raw_group_size"
GROUP BY "species"

SELECT AVG("agonism_int") AS mean_agonism_intensity
FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
WHERE "species" = 'P. lata' AND "sex" = 'male' AND "treatment" LIKE '%male-male%'

SELECT SUM("block") AS total_blocking_instances
FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
WHERE "species" = 'P. cribrata' AND "sex" = 'male'

SELECT AVG("FreqHets") AS mean_heterozygosity
FROM "raw_snp_data"
WHERE "CallRate" >= 0.8

WITH agonism_data AS (
  SELECT "species", "sex", "between_within", "total_time_interacting", "video_duration", "num_agon"
  FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
  WHERE "species" = 'P. lata' AND "sex" = 'male' AND "between_within" = 'within'
),
agonism_rate AS (
  SELECT "total_time_interacting", "video_duration", "num_agon",
         ("num_agon" / "video_duration") * 3600 AS agonism_rate_per_hour
  FROM agonism_data
)
SELECT avg(agonism_rate_per_hour) AS mean_agonism_rate_per_hour,
       avg(agonism_rate_per_hour) - 1.96 * stddev(agonism_rate_per_hour) / sqrt(count(*)) AS lower_95_ci,
       avg(agonism_rate_per_hour) + 1.96 * stddev(agonism_rate_per_hour) / sqrt(count(*)) AS upper_95_ci
FROM agonism_rate

WITH mean_body_length AS (
  SELECT "species", AVG("size") AS mean_body_length
  FROM "raw_body_length"
  GROUP BY "species"
),
mean_aggregation_size AS (
  SELECT "species", AVG("total") AS mean_aggregation_size
  FROM "raw_group_size"
  GROUP BY "species"
),
mean_male_male_agonism_rate AS (
  SELECT "species", AVG("num_agon" / "video_duration" * 3600) AS mean_male_male_agonism_rate
  FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
  WHERE "sex" = 'male' AND "between_within" = 'within'
  GROUP BY "species"
)
SELECT b."species", 
       b.mean_body_length, 
       a.mean_aggregation_size, 
       m.mean_male_male_agonism_rate
FROM mean_body_length b
JOIN mean_aggregation_size a ON b."species" = a."species"
JOIN mean_male_male_agonism_rate m ON b."species" = m."species"

WITH size_stats AS (
  SELECT "population", "sex", avg("size") AS mean_size
  FROM "raw_body_length"
  GROUP BY "population", "sex"
)
SELECT 
  "population",
  (max(mean_size) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') - max(mean_size) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male')) AS sexual_size_dimorphism
FROM size_stats
GROUP BY "population"

SELECT "subgroup", COUNT(DISTINCT "id") AS num_genotyped_individuals
FROM "idfile"
WHERE "pop" = 'Blackburn'
GROUP BY "subgroup"
ORDER BY "subgroup"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS snp_loci_count FROM "raw_snp_data" WHERE "CallRate" >= 0.8

SELECT 
    MIN("CallRate") AS min_callrate,
    MAX("CallRate") AS max_callrate,
    MIN("OneRatioSnp") AS min_oneratiosnp,
    MAX("OneRatioSnp") AS max_oneratiosnp,
    MIN("FreqHets") AS min_freqhets,
    MAX("FreqHets") AS max_freqhets,
    MIN("AvgPIC") AS min_avgpic,
    MAX("AvgPIC") AS max_avgpic
FROM 
    "raw_snp_data"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_assays, COUNT(DISTINCT "sex") AS distinct_sex_pairings FROM "raw_behaviour_data"

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
    MIN("size") AS min_size,
    MAX("size") AS max_size,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "size" IS NULL) AS null_size_count
FROM 
    "raw_body_length"

SELECT COUNT(*) AS mismatched_rows
FROM "raw_group_size"
WHERE "total" <> "adults" + "nymphs"
SELECT "id", COUNT(*) AS count FROM "idfile" GROUP BY "id" HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

SELECT DISTINCT "species"
FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
WHERE "species" NOT IN ('P. lata', 'P. cribrata')

SELECT DISTINCT "population"
FROM (
  SELECT "population" FROM "raw_group_size"
  UNION
  SELECT "population" FROM "raw_body_length"
  UNION
  SELECT "pop" FROM "idfile"
) AS all_populations
WHERE "population" NOT IN ('NSW', 'LHI', 'P. lata', 'P. cribrata', 'Panesthia')

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_assays
FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
WHERE "video_duration" IS NULL OR "video_duration" <= 0

WITH species_in_group_size AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "species" FROM "raw_group_size"
),
species_in_body_length AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "species" FROM "raw_body_length"
),
species_in_behaviour_data AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "species" FROM "raw_behaviour_data"
)
SELECT s."species",
       CASE WHEN g."species" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS in_group_size,
       CASE WHEN b."species" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS in_body_length,
       CASE WHEN bh."species" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS in_behaviour_data
FROM (
  SELECT "species" FROM species_in_group_size
  UNION
  SELECT "species" FROM species_in_body_length
  UNION
  SELECT "species" FROM species_in_behaviour_data
) s
LEFT JOIN species_in_group_size g ON s."species" = g."species"
LEFT JOIN species_in_body_length b ON s."species" = b."species"
LEFT JOIN species_in_behaviour_data bh ON s."species" = bh."species"

SELECT "stim", 
       percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lat_mov") AS median_movement_latency,
       count(*) AS number_of_trials
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
GROUP BY "stim"

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "lat_mov") AS median_movement_latency
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
WHERE "stim" = 'visual'

SELECT 
    "stimulus",
    AVG("call01") AS acoustic_response_rate,
    AVG("vsig01") AS visual_response_rate,
    COUNT(*) AS number_of_trials
FROM 
    "env_0_1_fixed"
GROUP BY 
    "stimulus"

SELECT "stim" AS stimulus_type, 
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "mov_status" = 2)::double precision / COUNT(*) AS fraction_moved,
       COUNT(*) AS total_trials
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
GROUP BY "stim"
ORDER BY "stim"

WITH correlation_data AS (
    SELECT "stimulus", 
           corr("vsig01", "noise") AS pearson_correlation,
           regr_slope("vsig01", "noise") AS slope
    FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
    GROUP BY "stimulus"
)
SELECT "stimulus", pearson_correlation, slope
FROM correlation_data

SELECT sum((observed - expected) * (observed - expected) / expected) AS chi_square_statistic
FROM (
  SELECT "stimulus", "call01", COUNT(*) AS observed,
         (COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY "stimulus") * COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY "call01"))::double precision / COUNT(*) OVER () AS expected
  FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
  GROUP BY "stimulus", "call01"
) AS subquery

WITH ranked AS (
  SELECT "ind", "condition", "lat_mov",
         PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY "condition") AS condition_percentile
  FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
  WHERE "stim" = 'multimodal' AND "mov_status" = 2
),
moving_avg AS (
  SELECT "ind", "condition", "lat_mov", condition_percentile,
         AVG("lat_mov") OVER (ORDER BY "condition" ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS moving_avg_lat_mov
  FROM ranked
)
SELECT "ind", "condition", condition_percentile, moving_avg_lat_mov
FROM moving_avg
ORDER BY "condition"

SELECT 'env_0_1_fixed' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lat_surv_females_fixed' AS table_name, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "ind") AS distinct_females_tested FROM "env_0_1_fixed"

SELECT *
FROM "lat_surv_females_fixed"
WHERE ("lat_call" = 480 AND "call_status" = 2)
   OR ("lat_call" < 480 AND "call_status" = 1)
   OR ("lat_vs" = 480 AND "vs_status" = 2)
   OR ("lat_vs" < 480 AND "vs_status" = 1)
   OR ("lat_mov" = 480 AND "mov_status" = 2)
   OR ("lat_mov" < 480 AND "mov_status" = 1)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS disagreement_count
FROM "env_0_1_fixed" e
JOIN "lat_surv_females_fixed" l ON e."ind" = l."ind" AND e."stimulus" = l."stim"
WHERE (e."call01" = 1 AND l."call_status" = 1) OR (e."call01" = 0 AND l."call_status" = 2)
   OR (e."vsig01" = 1 AND l."vs_status" = 1) OR (e."vsig01" = 0 AND l."vs_status" = 2)

SELECT "env_0_1_fixed"."ind", "env_0_1_fixed"."stimulus", "lat_surv_females_fixed"."stim"
FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
JOIN "lat_surv_females_fixed" ON "env_0_1_fixed"."ind" = "lat_surv_females_fixed"."ind"
WHERE "env_0_1_fixed"."vsig01" <> ("lat_surv_females_fixed"."vs_status" - 1)

SELECT "stimulus", COUNT(*) AS trial_count
FROM "env_0_1_fixed"
GROUP BY "stimulus"

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex", 
    "Perch height (cm)", 
    rank() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") AS rank
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental' AND "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex", 
    COUNT(*) AS n, 
    SUM(rank) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "sex"
),
overall_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS N, 
    SUM(rank) AS R
  FROM ranked_data
)
SELECT 
  g."sex", 
  g.n, 
  (g.rank_sum - g.n * (g.n + 1) / 2) / sqrt(o.N * (o.N + 1) / 12) AS z_statistic
FROM group_stats g, overall_stats o

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "ID", 
    "Perch height (cm)", 
    "sex", 
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") AS rank
  FROM 
    "Sheet2"
  WHERE 
    "age" = 'adult' AND 
    "plot" = 'used' AND 
    "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
grouped_data AS (
  SELECT 
    "sex", 
    COUNT(*) AS n, 
    SUM(rank) AS rank_sum
  FROM 
    ranked_data
  GROUP BY 
    "sex"
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    g1."sex" AS sex1, 
    g1.n AS n1, 
    g1.rank_sum AS rank_sum1, 
    g2."sex" AS sex2, 
    g2.n AS n2, 
    g2.rank_sum AS rank_sum2
  FROM 
    grouped_data g1
  JOIN 
    grouped_data g2 
  ON 
    g1."sex" <> g2."sex"
)
SELECT 
  sex1, 
  n1, 
  sex2, 
  n2, 
  (rank_sum1 - n1 * (n1 + 1) / 2.0) AS U1,
  (rank_sum2 - n2 * (n2 + 1) / 2.0) AS U2,
  (rank_sum1 - n1 * (n1 + 1) / 2.0 - n1 * n2 / 2.0) / 
  SQRT(n1 * n2 * (n1 + n2 + 1) / 12.0) AS z
FROM 
  stats
WHERE 
  sex1 = 'male' AND 
  sex2 = 'female'

SELECT 
    sum((o - e) * (o - e) / e) AS chi_square_statistic
FROM (
    SELECT 
        "Vegetation density",
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') AS observed_male,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') AS observed_female,
        (count(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') + count(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female')) / 2.0 AS expected
    FROM "Sheet2"
    WHERE "age" = 'adult' AND "plot" = 'used'
    GROUP BY "Vegetation density"
) AS subquery,
LATERAL (
    VALUES 
        (observed_male, expected),
        (observed_female, expected)
) AS obs_exp(o, e)

SELECT "Vegetation type", 
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') AS male_count,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') AS female_count
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "age" = 'subadult' AND "plot" = 'experimental'
GROUP BY "Vegetation type"

WITH ranked_data AS (
  SELECT "Distance from nearest water (m)", "age",
         RANK() OVER (ORDER BY "Distance from nearest water (m)") AS rank
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'used' AND "Distance from nearest water (m)" IS NOT NULL
),
grouped_data AS (
  SELECT "age",
         COUNT(*) AS n,
         SUM(rank) AS rank_sum
  FROM ranked_data
  GROUP BY "age"
),
stats AS (
  SELECT 
    (SELECT n FROM grouped_data WHERE "age" = 'adult') AS n_adult,
    (SELECT n FROM grouped_data WHERE "age" = 'subadult') AS n_subadult,
    (SELECT rank_sum FROM grouped_data WHERE "age" = 'adult') AS rank_sum_adult,
    (SELECT rank_sum FROM grouped_data WHERE "age" = 'subadult') AS rank_sum_subadult
)
SELECT 
  n_adult, 
  n_subadult,
  (rank_sum_adult - n_adult * (n_adult + 1) / 2) AS U_adult,
  (rank_sum_subadult - n_subadult * (n_subadult + 1) / 2) AS U_subadult,
  (U_adult - U_subadult) / 
  SQRT((n_adult * n_subadult * (n_adult + n_subadult + 1)) / 12.0) AS mann_whitney_z
FROM stats

SELECT "age", "sex", percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Perch height (cm)") AS median_perch_height
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'
GROUP BY "age", "sex"
ORDER BY "age", "sex"

WITH stats AS (
  SELECT "age",
         avg("Tree height (cm)") AS mean_tree_height,
         stddev_samp("Tree height (cm)") AS stddev_tree_height,
         count(*) AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "plot" = 'used'
  GROUP BY "age"
),
adult AS (
  SELECT mean_tree_height AS mean_adult,
         stddev_tree_height AS stddev_adult,
         n AS n_adult
  FROM stats
  WHERE "age" = 'adult'
),
juvenile AS (
  SELECT mean_tree_height AS mean_juvenile,
         stddev_tree_height AS stddev_juvenile,
         n AS n_juvenile
  FROM stats
  WHERE "age" = 'subadult'
)
SELECT mean_adult, mean_juvenile,
       (mean_adult - mean_juvenile) / sqrt(((stddev_adult^2 / n_adult) + (stddev_juvenile^2 / n_juvenile))) AS welch_t_statistic,
       (mean_adult - mean_juvenile) / sqrt(((stddev_adult^2 * (n_adult - 1) + stddev_juvenile^2 * (n_juvenile - 1)) / (n_adult + n_juvenile - 2))) AS cohens_d
FROM adult, juvenile

SELECT "sex",
       percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Light intensity (Lux)") AS median_light_intensity,
       avg("Light intensity (Lux)") AS mean_light_intensity
FROM "Sheet2"
WHERE "age" = 'adult' AND "plot" = 'used'
GROUP BY "sex"

SELECT 
    "sex",
    percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "Rock height (cm)") AS median_rock_height,
    (avg("Rock height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') - avg("Rock height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female')) /
    sqrt(((count("Rock height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') - 1) * var_samp("Rock height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') +
          (count("Rock height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') - 1) * var_samp("Rock height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female')) /
         (count("Rock height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'male') + count("Rock height (cm)") FILTER (WHERE "sex" = 'female') - 2)) AS cohens_d
FROM 
    "Sheet2"
WHERE 
    "age" = 'subadult' AND
    "plot" = 'experimental' AND
    "sex" IN ('male', 'female')
GROUP BY 
    "sex"

SELECT 
    "Vegetation type",
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 END) AS used_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 END) AS available_count,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 END)::double precision / 
    NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'control' THEN 1 END), 0) AS use_vs_availability_ratio
FROM 
    "Sheet2"
WHERE 
    "sex" = 'male' AND "age" = 'subadult'
GROUP BY 
    "Vegetation type"
ORDER BY 
    "Vegetation type"

SELECT 
    "Vegetation density",
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental') AS used_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'control') AS available_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'experimental')::double precision / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "plot" = 'control'), 0) AS use_vs_availability_ratio
FROM 
    "Sheet2"
WHERE 
    "sex" = 'male' AND "age" = 'adult'
GROUP BY 
    "Vegetation density"

WITH complete_pairs AS (
  SELECT "Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)"
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NOT NULL AND "Rock size (cm)" IS NOT NULL
),
correlation_all AS (
  SELECT corr("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") AS correlation_all,
         count(*) AS complete_pairs_all
  FROM complete_pairs
),
correlation_used AS (
  SELECT corr("Rock height (cm)", "Rock size (cm)") AS correlation_used,
         count(*) AS complete_pairs_used
  FROM complete_pairs
  WHERE "plot" = 'experimental'
)
SELECT correlation_all, complete_pairs_all, correlation_used, complete_pairs_used
FROM correlation_all, correlation_used

WITH regression AS (
  SELECT regr_slope("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS slope,
         regr_intercept("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS intercept,
         regr_r2("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS r_squared
  FROM "Sheet2"
),
correlation AS (
  SELECT corr("Perch height (cm)", "Tree height (cm)") AS pearson_correlation
  FROM "Sheet2"
)
SELECT slope, intercept, r_squared, pearson_correlation
FROM regression, correlation

WITH plot_stats AS (
  SELECT "plot", 
         avg("Tree height (cm)") AS mean_tree_height, 
         var_samp("Tree height (cm)") AS var_tree_height, 
         count(*) AS n
  FROM "Sheet2"
  WHERE "Tree height (cm)" IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY "plot"
),
cohens_d_calc AS (
  SELECT 
    max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot"='experimental') AS mean_experimental,
    max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot"='random') AS mean_random,
    (max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot"='experimental') - max(mean_tree_height) FILTER (WHERE "plot"='random')) /
    sqrt((sum((n-1) * var_tree_height) / (sum(n) - 2))) AS cohens_d
  FROM plot_stats
)
SELECT mean_experimental, mean_random, cohens_d FROM cohens_d_calc

exec_err: UndefinedFunction: function skewness(double precision) does not exist
sql:
SELECT 
    skewness("Perch height (cm)") AS perch_height_skewness,
    kurtosis("Perch height (cm)") - 3 AS perch_height_excess_kurtosis
FROM 
    "Sheet2"
WHERE 
    "Perch height (cm)" IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'experimental' THEN 1 END) AS experimental_count,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN "plot" = 'random' THEN 1 END) AS random_count
FROM "Sheet2"

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS total_observations,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "Individual number") AS distinct_individuals,
    COUNT(*) - COUNT(DISTINCT "Individual number") AS recaptures
FROM 
    "Sheet2"

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Distance from nearest water (m)" IS NULL) AS missing_distance_water,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Distance from nearest road (m)" IS NULL) AS missing_distance_road,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Light intensity (Lux)" IS NULL) AS missing_light_intensity,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock height (cm)" IS NULL) AS missing_rock_height,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE "Rock size (cm)" IS NULL) AS missing_rock_size
FROM "Sheet2"

SELECT "Vegetation type", "Vegetation coverage", "Vegetation density", "Substrate status", COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM "Sheet2"
GROUP BY "Vegetation type", "Vegetation coverage", "Vegetation density", "Substrate status"
ORDER BY "Vegetation type", "Vegetation coverage", "Vegetation density", "Substrate status"

SELECT "sex", "age", COUNT(DISTINCT "plot") AS "used_plots_count"
FROM "Sheet2"
GROUP BY "sex", "age"

SELECT 'juvenile' AS life_stage, 'strongyle' AS parasite, COUNT(*) AS record_count FROM "strong_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'juvenile', 'fluke', COUNT(*) FROM "fluke_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'juvenile', 'ecg', COUNT(*) FROM "ecg_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'adult', 'strongyle', COUNT(*) FROM "adult_strong_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'adult', 'fluke', COUNT(*) FROM "adult_fluke_df"
UNION ALL
SELECT 'adult', 'ecg', COUNT(*) FROM "adult_ecg_df"

WITH maternal_mean_burden AS (
    SELECT "MumCode",
           AVG("lEPG") AS mean_strongyle_burden,
           COUNT(*) AS sample_size
    FROM "strong_df"
    GROUP BY "MumCode"
),
ranked_maternal_lines AS (
    SELECT "MumCode",
           mean_strongyle_burden,
           sample_size,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY mean_strongyle_burden DESC) AS rank
    FROM maternal_mean_burden
)
SELECT "MumCode", mean_strongyle_burden, sample_size, rank
FROM ranked_maternal_lines
WHERE rank <= 5
ORDER BY rank

WITH yearly_survival AS (
  SELECT "Year", 
         AVG("Survived.mod") AS yearly_survival_rate, 
         COUNT(*) AS sample_size
  FROM "strong_df"
  GROUP BY "Year"
),
moving_average AS (
  SELECT "Year", 
         yearly_survival_rate, 
         sample_size,
         AVG(yearly_survival_rate) OVER (ORDER BY "Year" ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND 1 FOLLOWING) AS three_year_moving_avg
  FROM yearly_survival
)
SELECT "Year", 
       yearly_survival_rate, 
       sample_size, 
       three_year_moving_avg
FROM moving_average
ORDER BY "Year"

SELECT COUNT(*) AS no_matching_fluke_records
FROM "strong_df" s
LEFT JOIN "fluke_df" f
ON s."Name" = f."Name" AND s."Year" = f."Year" AND s."Season" = f."Season"
WHERE f."Name" IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_out_of_domain FROM "strong_df" WHERE "Season" NOT IN ('Autumn', 'Spring', 'Summer')

SELECT "Survived.mod", 
       AVG("lEPG") AS mean_strongyle_burden, 
       COUNT(*) AS sample_size
FROM "strong_df"
GROUP BY "Survived.mod"

SELECT 
    min("FROH") AS min_inbreeding,
    max("FROH") AS max_inbreeding,
    min("lEPG") AS min_burden,
    max("lEPG") AS max_burden
FROM 
    "adult_strong_df"

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") AS distinct_juvenile_deer
FROM (
    SELECT "Name" FROM "strong_df"
    UNION
    SELECT "Name" FROM "fluke_df"
    UNION
    SELECT "Name" FROM "ecg_df"
) AS juvenile_deer

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    COUNT(DISTINCT "Name") AS distinct_adult_deer
FROM (
    SELECT "Name" FROM "adult_fluke_df"
    UNION
    SELECT "Name" FROM "adult_ecg_df"
) AS adult_deer

WITH strong_fluke AS (
  SELECT s."Name", s."Year", s."Season", s."lEPG" AS strong_lEPG, f."lEPG" AS fluke_lEPG
  FROM "strong_df" s
  JOIN "fluke_df" f ON s."Name" = f."Name" AND s."Year" = f."Year" AND s."Season" = f."Season"
),
strong_ecg AS (
  SELECT s."Name", s."Year", s."Season", s."lEPG" AS strong_lEPG, e."lEPG" AS ecg_lEPG
  FROM "strong_df" s
  JOIN "ecg_df" e ON s."Name" = e."Name" AND s."Year" = e."Year" AND s."Season" = e."Season"
),
fluke_ecg AS (
  SELECT f."Name", f."Year", f."Season", f."lEPG" AS fluke_lEPG, e."lEPG" AS ecg_lEPG
  FROM "fluke_df" f
  JOIN "ecg_df" e ON f."Name" = e."Name" AND f."Year" = e."Year" AND f."Season" = e."Season"
)
SELECT 'strong_fluke' AS pair, 
       CORR(strong_lEPG, fluke_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation, 
       COUNT(*) AS matched_sample_size
FROM strong_fluke
UNION ALL
SELECT 'strong_ecg' AS pair, 
       CORR(strong_lEPG, ecg_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation, 
       COUNT(*) AS matched_sample_size
FROM strong_ecg
UNION ALL
SELECT 'fluke_ecg' AS pair, 
       CORR(fluke_lEPG, ecg_lEPG) AS pearson_correlation, 
       COUNT(*) AS matched_sample_size
FROM fluke_ecg
SELECT * FROM "adult_strong_df" WHERE "Survived.mod" IS DISTINCT FROM 0 AND "Survived.mod" IS DISTINCT FROM 1
SELECT min("Year") AS earliest_year, max("Year") AS latest_year FROM "fluke_df"

WITH correlation AS (
  SELECT "AgeCat",
         corr("lEPG", "FROH") AS pearson_correlation,
         covar_samp("lEPG", "FROH") / var_samp("FROH") AS regression_slope,
         count(*) AS sample_size
  FROM "strong_df"
  WHERE "AgeCat" IN ('C', 'Y')
  GROUP BY "AgeCat"
)
SELECT "AgeCat", pearson_correlation, regression_slope, sample_size
FROM correlation

SELECT width_bucket("FROH", -2, 9, 5) AS inbreeding_bin, count(*) AS record_count
FROM "adult_fluke_df"
GROUP BY inbreeding_bin
ORDER BY inbreeding_bin
